data.name: Sex Game - BDSM - Episode 4
data.detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in an erotic visual novel that explores the bond between a submissive and her Master, paired with an interactive sex simulator.

GAME DESCRIPTION

Veronica and her Master continue their BDSM experience, with some new mechanical toys and water play for a more intense pleasure. 

FEATURES

- Image and video gallery, so you can enjoy the animations and renderings.
- HD renders and animations.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
